global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with promotional text and a call-to-action button.
global.main_message: Promoting travel offers with flexible booking options.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center with a light orange outline, containing additional elements.

elements.label: Dream destinations text
elements.description: Bold, white text that reads 'Dream destinations' prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main headline, stating 'Flexible booking options'.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button in white with bold text 'Get offer' in the center.

elements.label: Small circular element
elements.description: A small light orange circle positioned towards the bottom left of the main content area.

elements.label: Small oval element
elements.description: A small oval shape in light orange, slightly overlapping with the circular element.

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: A bold yellow text box at the top right corner stating 'SALE'.
elements.text_content: destinations Get offer Flexible booking options

elements.label: Dream text
elements.description: The word 'Dream' in a larger font, positioned above the main headline in white.

elements.label: NomadLayer logo
elements.description: A small logo in the top left corner with the text 'NomadLayer' in a bold font.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold text, positioned at the top right.
